title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Lucknow

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Lucknow
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Lucknow. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!
